pubspec.name: custom_lint
pubspec.description: Lint rules are a powerful way to improve the maintainability of a project. The more, the merrier! But while Dart offers a wide variety of lint rules by default, it cannot reasonably include every possible lint. For example, Dart does not include lints related to third-party packages. Custom_lint fixes that by allowing package authors to write custom lint rules.
